description:
Add a mechanism that periodically checks for new bw releases and signals to the agent/user by creating/updating a beadwork ticket with upgrade instructions.

## Design

When bw runs a command that opens the store, it checks (at most once per day) whether a newer release is available on GitHub. If one is found, it creates or updates a bead labeled `beadwork-upgrade` with the target version, changelog, and upgrade instructions.

## Key decisions

- **Cache file at ~/.cache/bw/version-check.json** — stores lastCheck timestamp and latestVersion. Checked before any network call.
- **24h throttle, unconditional** — the timestamp is written regardless of API success or failure. A network timeout means 'we tried today, move on' — no retrying on every subsequent command.
- **Label-based sentinel** (`beadwork-upgrade`) — at most one open upgrade ticket exists. Found by scanning open issues for the label.
- **Update in place** — if a newer release supersedes the current upgrade ticket, title and description are updated rather than creating a new ticket.
- **P1 priority** — high enough to surface in bw ready, not P0-critical.
- **Non-blocking, fail-silent** — errors never break normal commands.
- **Auto-close on upgrade** — successful bw upgrade finds and closes the upgrade bead.
title: Periodic upgrade notification
